files.00_Overview.md: Add Learning Objectives section at the beginning. Expand each section with explicit 'What' (definition), 'Why' (physical significance), and 'How' (application) structure. Add Key Takeaways section before Concept Check. Remove redundancy - this should be a navigation hub, not repeat all detailed equations.
files.01_Mass_Conservation.md: Add Learning Objectives and clear Overview with 3W structure. Expand each equation form with 'What is this form?', 'When to use it?', and 'How it differs from others?'. Add practical examples section showing when to use general vs incompressible vs VOF forms. Add Key Takeaways.
files.02_Momentum_Conservation.md: Add Learning Objectives. Reorganize interphase forces section with 3W structure for each force type (What/Why/How). Add physical interpretation section explaining shared pressure concept more thoroughly. Add Key Takeaways. Boundary conditions section needs more context on when to use each type.
files.03_Energy_Conservation.md: Add Learning Objectives. Expand interphase heat transfer section with 3W framework. Add comparison section: when to use enthalpy vs temperature formulations. Add practical examples of heat transfer correlation selection. Add Key Takeaways. Phase change section needs more 'Why this matters' context.
files.04_Interfacial_Phenomena_Equations.md: Add Learning Objectives. Reorganize each phenomenon (Young-Laplace, CSF, Contact Angle, Marangoni) with clear 3W structure. Marangoni effect section is too brief - expand with physical significance and applications. Add Key Takeaways. Contact angle section needs practical examples.

global_strategy: This reference folder needs consistent 3W Framework (What/Why/How) application throughout. All files are missing Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections. The Overview (00) should be a true navigation guide with less detail, while detail files (01-04) should expand with deeper explanations. Add more practical examples connecting equations to real multiphase flow scenarios. Ensure consistent Thai-English balance across all files. Consider adding a 'Common Pitfalls' section to each file.
